entities.name: Customer
entities.description: A person or organization that holds one or more accounts with the bank.

entities.name: Account
entities.description: A financial account held by a customer at the bank.

entities.name: Transaction
entities.description: A financial movement of funds between accounts or parties.

entities.name: PaymentInstruction
entities.description: An instruction to move funds, often represented as an ISO 20022 message.

entities.name: Counterparty
entities.description: The other party involved in a transaction or relationship.

entities.name: Event
entities.description: A significant occurrence in the lifecycle of an account, transaction, or customer.

entities.name: Exception
entities.description: An error or deviation from expected processing in payments or core banking.

entities.name: RegulatoryRule
entities.description: A rule derived from regulation that constrains or guides system behavior.

entities.name: RiskIndicator
entities.description: A signal or feature used to assess financial crime, credit, or operational risk.

entities.name: LegacyComponent
entities.description: A legacy system component such as a COBOL or Assembler module.

relationships.name: Customer-Owns-Account
relationships.description: A customer may own one or more accounts.

relationships.name: Account-Has-Transaction
relationships.description: An account can have many transactions.

relationships.name: Transaction-Has-Counterparty
relationships.description: A transaction may involve a counterparty.

relationships.name: Transaction-Generates-Event
relationships.description: A transaction can generate one or more operational events.

relationships.name: Transaction-Has-Exception
relationships.description: A transaction may have associated processing exceptions.

relationships.name: RegulatoryRule-AppliesTo-Transaction
relationships.description: Regulatory rules apply to specific transaction types or flows.

relationships.name: RiskIndicator-Flags-Transaction
relationships.description: Risk indicators can flag transactions as suspicious or high risk.

relationships.name: LegacyComponent-Processes-Transaction
relationships.description: Legacy components participate in processing specific transaction flows.

relationships.name: RegulatoryRule-Defines-RiskIndicator
relationships.description: Regulatory rules may define or require specific risk indicators.
